subject: fix(tap): iOS zoom prevention, inputMode, touch targets, safe areas
body:
Input fields: Changed text-sm (14px) to text-base (16px) in shared
INPUT_BASE to prevent iOS Safari auto-zoom on input focus. Added
inputMode="email"/autoComplete="email" to EmailField, inputMode="tel"/
autoComplete="tel" to PhoneField, inputMode="decimal" to NumberField
so mobile keyboards match the field type.

Touch targets: Increased PageTabs rename button from p-0.5 to p-1.5
(~36px touch area). Added p-2 padding to SubmissionDetail close button
(was bare 16px SVG). Increased FormRenderer Back button from py-2 to
py-2.5 for WCAG 2.5.5 compliance.

Safe areas: Added pb-safe to BottomSheet container so the sheet's
bottom edge clears the home indicator on notched devices.

Tags: mobile, touch-targets, ios, accessibility, safe-areas
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: form-builder
Semver: patch
